articles.title: BlackRock CEO Larry Fink Says Bitcoin Is Digital Gold, So What’s The Digital Silver?
articles.description: On Wednesday, an interview with BlackRock CEO Larry Fink went viral in which the CEO called Bitcoin an international asset. Not only that, Fink also pointed toward digital assets such as Bitcoin as being a way to digitize gold on the blockchain. This statement from the CEO has since been interpreted in various ways to mean that Fink referred to BTC as digital gold. So the question now remains,...

articles.title: Shiba Inu Core Dev Teases Shibarium Launch Timeline Amid Super Bullish Strategy For SHIB
articles.description: Shytoshi Kusama, the lead developer behind Shiba Inu, has provided a glimpse into the highly anticipated launch of Shibarium, a layer-2 protocol within the Shiba Inu ecosystem, sparking excitement and speculation among the community.

articles.title: Binance Labs Leads $4M Funding for AI Blockchain Data Firm Web3Go
articles.description: Singapore-based blockchain start-up Web3Go has raised $4 million in a seed round led by Binance Labs, the venture capital and incubator arm of crypto exchange giant Binance. According to the press release, other participants in the seed round financing included Hashkey Capital, NGC, Shima Capital, IVC, LIF, Big Brain Holdings, and Archerman Capital. ...
